text: Another important new player entered the Dutch television market in September 2013: the paid American streaming service Netflix. Within a year, the company gained one million Dutch subscribers. By mid-2017, this number had grown to 2.35 million subscribers, according to research agency [Telecompaper](https://www.telecompaper.com/pressrelease/toename-gebruik-video-on-demand-vooral-via-netflix-2--1208460) . The number of minutes watched of streaming video-on-demand (vod) more than doubled between 2015 and 2017, from an average of 11 minutes per day to 23 minutes per day. Personalised content and advertising
